status.description:
The current status of the indicator. Controls the default color when 'customColor' is not set.
- ok    → green
- warn  → yellow/orange
- error → red
- off   → grey

label.description: Text label displayed below (or beside) the LED indicator.

labelPosition.description: Position of the label relative to the indicator circle.

size.description: Diameter of the LED indicator circle in pixels.

blink.description: When true the indicator pulses with a blink animation.

blinkSpeed.description: Blink speed in Hz (cycles per second). Only used when 'blink' is true.

customColor.description: Override the status colour with any CSS colour string (e.g. '#FF5733' or 'rgb(255,87,51)'). Leave empty to use the default status colour.

showGlow.description: When true a soft glow shadow is applied around the indicator circle.

fontSize.description: Font size of the label text in pixels.
